headline: How Charter’s AI Contact Center Push With RingCentral Shapes Its Broader Digital Strategy At CHTR
summary: Earlier this month, Charter Communications launched a Multiview feature on the Spectrum TV App, allowing customers with eligible packages to watch up to four NCAA basketball games simultaneously across devices including Xumo, Apple TV, Roku, Xbox, and major smart TV brands. Charter also expanded its partnership with RingCentral to bring AI-powered RingCX contact center and AI Conversation Expert tools to Spectrum Business customers, integrating communications, analytics, and customer...
